name.heading: What should we call your budget?
name.subtext: You can always change this later.

account.heading: Add your first account
account.subtext: This is usually your main checking account.

categories.heading: Choose your categories
categories.subtext: Uncheck any you don't need. You can add more later.

ready.heading: You're all set!
ready.subtextLocal: Your budget is ready to go.
ready.subtextServer: Your budget has been created and is syncing.
